name: Dak's Ear-Coconut Oat Bran Bread (Bread Machine)
recipeIngredient: 1 cup (8 oz.) Libby's Lite Pears, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all the ingredients in the bread machine in the order listed.
2. Set the browning control to light.
3. Select "Oat/French" setting.
4. Push the Start button.
